abilities.name: Caught in the Ring
abilities.text: Models engaged by this model cannot target other models with attack actions.

abilities.name: Expert Climber
abilities.text: Once per activation. This model may ignore vertical distance while resolving the Walk or Charge action.

abilities.name: Resilient
abilities.text: Attacks targeting this model reduce raises they receive by 1 (to a minimum of 0).

abilities.name: Rush
abilities.text: While resolving the Charge action, increase the distance this model moves by up to +2".

actions.name: Takedown
actions.costs_and_restrictions: If the target is within 1" of a Piano marker, this action receives a (+).

triggers.name: Critical Strike
triggers.text: When resolving, this action deals +1 damage to the target.

actions.name: Toss in the Mud
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This action may target friendly models.
actions.effects: Move the target 2" in any direction, then remove up to one token from the target.

actions.name: Off the Top Rope
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This action may only be declared if this model is at an elevation of 2 or higher.
actions.effects: Place this model within 5", at a lower elevation. This model is dealt 1 falling damage, then it deals 1 damage to all models in base contact. Then, this model may declare an attack action, which receives a (+).

actions.name: Tap the Leyline
actions.effects: Draw two cards and then discard one card.
